variants: Jaume Carbonell is known for his pioneering work in hydrology, particularly with the Inkwell Simulation Matrix, which has significantly impacted water distribution research. He is actively involved with the Lantern Bearers Hall, a community dedicated to enhancing knowledge in water sciences. During his academic career, Jaume was guided by his mentor, Megan Hinchcliffe, who played an essential role in shaping his research focus. His innovative projects have consistently benefitted from the generous support of the Orbital Harmony Fund, allowing him to further his contributions to the field of hydrology.
